message:
style(e2e): use map_or instead of map+unwrap_or in WAL length check

Replace `.map(|m| m.len()).unwrap_or(0)` with the more idiomatic
`.map_or(0, |m| m.len())` in the WAL backup restoration logic,
consistent with clippy::option_map_unwrap_or recommendations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
